Welcome to Mechanical Engineering

The Department of Mechanical Engineering at UGIP Nainital is at the forefront of technical training and engineering excellence.

Established in 1992, our department has been consistently producing skilled engineers who excel in thermodynamics, machine design, and modern manufacturing processes.

Our curriculum is tailored to bridge the gap between academic theory and industrial reality, supported by extensive workshop facilities, high-end laboratory equipment, and seasoned faculty members.

👁️

Our Vision

To produce highly competent mechanical engineers with strong ethical values, innovative problem-solving skills, and deep technical knowledge, ready to contribute to global industrial development.

Curriculum Overview

The Diploma in Mechanical Engineering is a comprehensive 3-year program covering fundamental sciences and advanced mechanical specializations.

Sem 1English & Communication Skills
Sem 1Applied Mathematics – I
Sem 1Applied Physics – I
Sem 1Applied Chemistry – I
Sem 1Computer Fundamentals
Sem 2Applied Mathematics – II
Sem 2Environmental Science & Energy
Sem 2Engineering Graphics
Sem 2General Workshop Practice

Master core mechanical engineering subjects including Strength of Materials, Thermodynamics, Fluid Mechanics, Machine Design, CAD/CAM, Manufacturing Technology, and Automobile Engineering, accompanied by industrial visits and major projects.

View Full Syllabus on UBTER

Career Opportunities

Mechanical graduates from UGIP find placements in diverse industrial sectors, from automotive giants to defense manufacturing.

Production Supervisor CAD/CAM Operator Quality Control Engineer Maintenance Engineer Defense Manufacturing Automotive Tech Railway Technical Staff Higher Education (B.Tech)
View Placement Details

Workshops & Labs

⚙️

Machine Shop

Featuring a range of high-precision lathe machines, milling, drilling, and grinding machines for comprehensive machining practice.

🔥

Thermal Engineering Lab

Equipped with IC engines, test rigs, steam boilers, and refrigeration experimental setups for advanced thermodynamic studies.

🔨

Welding & Smithy Shop

Modern arc and gas welding facilities along with forging and casting equipment to provide robust hands-on manufacturing training.
